disclaimer.title: Important Notice
disclaimer.body: AirTaxiShare does not provide transport services. Taxi rides are arranged independently by users. AirTaxiShare only matches passengers.

tos.title: Terms of Service
tos.body:
Welcome to AirTaxiShare!

1. Acceptance of Terms
By accessing or using the AirTaxiShare application, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you disagree with any part of these terms, you may not access the service.

2. Service Description
AirTaxiShare is a platform designed exclusively to connect passengers traveling from the same airport to similar destinations. We do not provide transportation, taxi, or logistics services. Any agreement for transportation is solely between the passengers and the licensed taxi driver.

3. User Conduct
You agree to provide accurate information (such as your phone number, destination, and luggage size) and to treat other matched passengers with respect and courtesy. Any form of harassment, fraud, or misuse of the platform will result in immediate termination of your account.

4. Financial Transactions
AirTaxiShare does not process payments for your taxi rides. All fare splits and payments must be handled directly between the passengers and the driver. AirTaxiShare is not responsible for any financial disputes arising from shared rides.

5. Limitation of Liability
AirTaxiShare shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or any loss of profits or revenues, whether incurred directly or indirectly, or any loss of data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses resulting from your access to or use of the platform.

By continuing, you acknowledge that you have read and understood these terms.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.body:
Privacy Policy

Last updated: 2026

1. Information We Collect
We collect information you provide directly to us when you create an account, such as your phone number, name, and profile picture (if provided). We also temporarily collect your location data to facilitate passenger matching at the airport. We use Apple Sign-In and Google Sign-In, which provide us with your name and email address.

2. How We Use Your Information
We use the information we collect to:
- Provide, maintain, and improve our services
- Match you with other passengers heading in a similar direction
- Send you technical notices, updates, security alerts, and support messages
- Facilitate communication between matched users via in-app chat

3. Data Sharing
We do not sell your personal information. We only share necessary information (such as your first name, approximate destination, and luggage size) with other users when a match is found to facilitate the meetup.

4. Data Retention
Your location data is only used during active matching sessions and is not stored permanently. Chat histories are retained temporarily to facilitate the current trip and are deleted within 24 hours after the trip concludes.

5. Your Rights
You have the right to request the deletion of your account and personal data at any time via the Settings screen within the application.

If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us.
